chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-732 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 09-10-2025 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G. **** Nadeem Memon, Accounts Clerk, M.C, Khairpur is present and files statement on behalf of respondent No.3, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioner. He submits that entire outstanding pensionary benefits have been paid to the petitioner and there remains nothing against the department. Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and does not press instant petition, which is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
